name: Wochenendgeschichten
overview: The weekend is rarely a time for relaxation or creativity. In reality, unmet needs, frustrations, hopes, and dreams collide. More often than not, something unexpected happens. In one episode, advertising director Jan is dumped by his long-time girlfriend. As he tries to reach her by phone, a steamy phone affair begins. In another story, arguments break out at a birthday party, ruining the entire celebration.
